'''The Pits''' was a [[Cantina/Legends|bar]] located on [[Stend VI]] that catered to and was a popular hangout for [[Swoop racing/Legends|swoop racers]]. It was owned by the [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] businessman [[Kaylo NaKuda]].
